scenarios.name: Occlusion
scenarios.description: The selected vehicle is temporarily hidden by foreground objects or traffic.

scenarios.name: Vehicle crossing
scenarios.description: Another vehicle crosses or overlaps the selected vehicle.

scenarios.name: Fast lateral motion
scenarios.description: The selected vehicle moves rapidly across the image plane.

scenarios.name: Re-entry
scenarios.description: The selected vehicle leaves the frame and later re-enters.

scenarios.name: Same color
scenarios.description: Distractor vehicles share the selected vehicle's dominant color.

scenarios.name: Same vehicle model
scenarios.description: Distractors are the same make and model as the selected vehicle.

scenarios.name: Similar livery
scenarios.description: Distractors carry visually similar paint, decals, or racing livery.

scenarios.name: Fast camera pan
scenarios.description: A rapid camera pan creates large global image motion.

scenarios.name: Zoom change
scenarios.description: Optical or digital zoom changes the target scale abruptly.

scenarios.name: Motion blur
scenarios.description: Target or camera motion substantially blurs vehicle appearance.

scenarios.name: Backlight
scenarios.description: Strong backlighting reduces visible target detail.

scenarios.name: Low light
scenarios.description: Low illumination increases noise and reduces target detail.

scenarios.name: Far distance
scenarios.description: The selected vehicle occupies a small region at long range.

scenarios.name: Scene cut
scenarios.description: A hard edit changes the scene while preserving the selected GID target.
